pull_requests.title: fix(security): AES key/IV validation, SecureRandom.base64Url, GCM docs + tests
pull_requests.author: tsavo-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Validates AES key and IV lengths and adds SecureRandom.base64Url for URL-safe encoding.

pull_requests.title: fix(security): 4 CRITICAL vulnerability fixes + test update
pull_requests.author: tsavo-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Fixes critical timing attacks in Fernet and RSA, significantly increases the default PBKDF2 iterations, and deprecates the insecure AES ECB mode.
